あなた.enTranslation: you (usually when one doesn't know the person)

ありがとうございます.reading: ありがとうございます

あげる.enTranslation: give (receiver is not in the speaker's group)

くれる.enTranslation: give (receiver is in the speaker's group)

君.enTranslation: you (to someone of equal or lower status)

失礼します.enTranslation: pardon me, excuse me (e.g. when leaving)

くん.enTranslation: kun (usu. used with men younger or of the same age)

やっぱり.enTranslation: just as I thought, after all

困る.enTranslation: be at a loss, be in trouble

当然.enTranslation: natural, as a matter of course

昔.enTranslation: a long time ago, the old days

しばらく.enTranslation: for a while, for the time being

用.enTranslation: things to do, (as a suffix) to do..., made for...

いきなり.enTranslation: all of a sudden, without warning

向こう.enTranslation: the other side, the other party, opponent

付く.enTranslation: attach itself to, be connected with, come in contact with

頂きます.enTranslation: let's eat!, thank you for the meal

確か.enTranslation: certainly, surely, if I'm not mistaken...

無くなる.enTranslation: to be lost, to be used up

もう少し.enTranslation: a little more, a bit more

一応.enTranslation: for the time being, more or less

放つ.enTranslation: emit, set free, shoot (e.g. an arrow or bullet)

振り返る.enTranslation: turn one's head, look back on

さすが.enTranslation: just as expected, true to one's reputation

そのもの.enTranslation: the very thing, the picture of

迎える.enTranslation: welcome, go out to meet, invite

同士.enTranslation: of the same kind, each other, fellow

苦手.enTranslation: hard to deal with, weak point

全力.enTranslation: with all of one's strength, at full capacity

重ねる.enTranslation: put on top of something, pile up

久しぶり.enTranslation: for the first time in a while

通う.enTranslation: go to and from, frequent a place

いつまでも.enTranslation: endlessly, as long as one likes

間に合う.enTranslation: be in time, answer the purpose, can do without

切れる.enTranslation: able to cut, run out, expire

ついでに.enTranslation: on the way, while one's at it

当時.enTranslation: at that time, at the present time

逃げ出す.enTranslation: make a break for, run off

たまらない.enTranslation: can't stand, can't put up with

よる.enTranslation: be caused by, be due to

越える.enTranslation: go over, go across, go beyond

弾く.enTranslation: to strum (e.g. a guitar), to flick

今更.enTranslation: now (when it's too late), at this stage

言い出す.enTranslation: begin to say, be the first to say, propose

収まる.enTranslation: to be settled (e.g. a dispute), to be contained within

先日.enTranslation: the other day, a few days ago
